allow: PowerShell($candidates = @\('seanmichaelford1','seanford','seanmford','sean-ford','seanmichaelford'\); foreach \($u in $candidates\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$u/southeast-roofing-website" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "FOUND: $\($r.full_name\) \(private: $\($r.private\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "not found: $u" } })

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Volta"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { Write-Output "$p : $\(Test-Path $p\)" }; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); npm run typecheck; if \($?\) { npm run build })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); npm run format; npm run lint; npm run typecheck)
